# Jacob Chuang (hungkaichuang.com)

> Jacob Chuang (Chinese: Jacob Chuang) is a trilingual lawyer focused on decision analysis and positioning strategy at the intersection of law, business, and technology. This site publishes articles in Traditional Chinese (zh-tw), English (en), and Japanese (jp).

## Author

- Name: Jacob Chuang (莊閎凱)
- Profession: Lawyer
- Languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese
- Education: Hitotsubashi University (Japan), National Taiwan University
- Focus: Decision analysis, positioning strategy, law, business, technology
- Expertise: Taiwan labor law, competition law, international regulatory policy, VASP/crypto compliance

## Content Series

- 決策與定位 (Decision & Positioning): Articles analyzing strategic decisions and positioning in business, technology, and policy (Articles 001–026)
- 法律策略 (Legal Strategy): Legal feasibility assessments and practical legal analysis for business operations (Article 027–)

## Site Structure

- Homepage (zh-tw): https://hungkaichuang.com/zh-tw/
- Homepage (en): https://hungkaichuang.com/en/
- Homepage (jp): https://hungkaichuang.com/jp/
- Writing (zh-tw): https://hungkaichuang.com/zh-tw/writing
- Writing (en): https://hungkaichuang.com/en/writing
- Writing (jp): https://hungkaichuang.com/jp/writing
- RSS Feed: https://hungkaichuang.com/rss.xml
